title: hud mover
description: HUD Mover is a Fabric mod that lets you move and customize vanilla HUD elements in-game.
body:
# HUD Mover **Full control over your vanilla HUD — directly in-game.** ![HUD Mover Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wEX2jPUi/61cf67eb31ecbe699309e095051a6b9065c1dc4d_96.webp)
--- ## ✨ Overview **HUD Mover** is a Fabric client-side mod that gives you complete control over the vanilla HUD layout — without resource packs or external tools. Move, align, lock, group, and fine-tune your HUD with a clean live editor built for real gameplay setups. --- ## 🖼 Preview
![Editor Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f26562897be1d76214671f6f04273738cec416c.png)
![Inventory + Recipe Book Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc26605e3a89a309189799564d1718146405bed3_0.webp)
![Hud Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1554dac430a9a1e7ddf1a10a4528a17ae3d4bcd5.png)
--- ## 🎯 What This Mod Does HUD Mover lets you reposition and customize vanilla HUD elements directly in-game with instant visual feedback. ### Supported HUD Elements - Hotbar - XP Bar - Inventory - Health - Armor - Hunger --- ## ⚙ Core Features ### 🖱 Live HUD Editor - Drag real HUD elements in real time - Instant visual feedback - Save / Cancel / Reset workflow ### 🎯 Precision Controls - Snap to grid - Adjustable grid size - Safe bounds (no off-screen mistakes) - Alignment guides ### 🧩 Advanced Editing - Multi-select movement - Lock / Unlock elements - Group / Ungroup - Undo / Redo history ### 👁 Visibility & Overlay Tools - Per-element alpha control - Selected Alpha control - Contextual opacity - Live overlay preview toggle ### 💾 Layout Management - Presets (Vanilla / Compact) - Import / Export layout files - Conflict detector for overlapping regions ### 📦 Inventory Integration - Survival & Creative inventory positioning - Recipe book compatibility handling --- ## 🚀 Why HUD Mover? - Keeps the vanilla look - Built for real gameplay setups - Perfect for ultrawide users - Great for PvP layouts - Stream-friendly positioning - Accessibility-focused spacing --- ## 🧭 Quick Start 1. Open the HUD editor from settings -> keybind 2. Select one or more HUD elements 3. Drag to position 4. Use grid/snap/guides 5. Save layout 6. Export as backup --- ## 📊 Feature Matrix | Category | Included | |---|---| | Live editor | ✅ | | Multi-select | ✅ | | Grid snap | ✅ | | Alignment guides | ✅ | | Undo / Redo | ✅ | | Lock / Group | ✅ | | Presets | ✅ | | Import / Export | ✅ | | Conflict detector | ✅ | | Contextual opacity | ✅ | | Safe bounds | ✅ | | Update notice | ✅ | --- ## 🔧 Compatibility - **Minecraft:** `1.21.11` - **Loader:** Fabric - **Environment:** Client-side > No server installation required. --- ## 📝 Notes - If your HUD breaks after updates, use **Reset** or apply a preset. - Always export a backup before major layout changes.
